commands.name: Save Project Snapshot
commands.description: Save the current cmux layout using the repo or directory name

commands.name: Preview Project Snapshot Restore
commands.description: Show the restore commands for the current repo or directory without running them

commands.name: Restore Project Snapshot
commands.description: Restore the saved layout for the current repo or directory

commands.name: Export Workspace Blueprint
commands.description: Export the live workspace into a crex Markdown blueprint

commands.name: Import Workspace Blueprint
commands.description: Create missing workspaces from the current crex Markdown blueprint

commands.name: Reload cmux Config
commands.description: Reload cmux settings and custom commands
